query:
INSERT INTO polling_stations (
            committee_session_id,
            prev_data_entry_id,
            name,
            number,
            number_of_voters,
            polling_station_type,
            address,
            postal_code,
            locality
        ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        RETURNING id AS "id!: _"
